keywords: BOLA ownership check flow canvas FLOW_IMMUTABLE DRAFT PUBLISHED one-way state machine tenantId AsyncLocalStorage FlowCanvasUpdated FlowImmutableRejected two-guard gate
teachingPoint: T617 FlowCanvasWriter enforces a 2-guard write gate in strict ORDER: ORDER 1 = BOLA (flow.tenantId === tenantId from ALS), ORDER 2 = FLOW_IMMUTABLE guard (PUBLISHED flows are immutable — rejects with FlowImmutableRejected). Only DRAFT flows may be mutated. FlowCanvasUpdated is emitted on success after DNA-8 audit storeDocument.
ironRules: ORDER 1 BOLA check: flow.tenantId must equal tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage — never from request payload
ORDER 2 FLOW_IMMUTABLE: FLOW_IMMUTABLE_STATES = ['PUBLISHED'] as const — any flow in PUBLISHED state is immutable, returns FlowImmutableRejected
FLOW_IMMUTABLE_STATES must be declared as compile-time constant (as const) — not a runtime set or string comparison
storeDocument(CANVAS_AUDIT_INDEX) MUST complete before enqueue(FlowCanvasUpdated) — DNA-8 outbox pattern
FlowImmutableRejected emitted on BOLA_VIOLATION or IMMUTABLE_STATE — all failure paths covered
